resources.string: You cannot access this model yet. Please follow the steps and return when complete.
The current model can only support 1 image per chat. To ask about another image, create a new chat.
The current model does not support image input.
The current model does not support audio input.
Sit tight, this can take up to 1 minute
To get started, tap the + below to add an image (max 10 images per chat) and type a prompt to ask a question about it!
To get started, tap the + below to add an image (max 1 image per chat) and type a prompt to ask a question about it!
To get started, tap the + below to add a audio clip (limited to 1 clip up to 30 seconds) and type a prompt to transcribe or translate it!

Compare benchmark runs by tapping the **Baseline** chip on any run result card to set the run as the comparison baseline. We\'ll automatically calculate and display the percentage differences in **all other** run result cards.
Ensure that the sum of prefill and decode tokens remains under the model\'s maximum token limit (%1$d vs %2$d)
You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?
Are you sure you want to delete the benchmark result?
Are you sure you want to delete the downloaded model \"%s\"?
Are you sure you want to delete the scheduled notification \"%s\"?
Learn more and see model license

string.name: llm_camera_status_waiting_to_start
string.description: Status text shown when LlmCamera is initialized and waiting for user input.

string.name: llm_camera_status_loading_model
string.description: Status text shown while loading the LlmCamera model.

string.name: llm_camera_status_listening
string.description: Status text shown when LlmCamera is listening to user speech. [CHAR_LIMIT=30] [BACKUP_MESSAGE_ID: 4062899179021837624]

string.name: llm_camera_status_processing
string.description: Status text shown while LlmCamera is processing speech or image input.

string.name: llm_camera_status_cancelled
string.description: Status text shown when LlmCamera processing was cancelled.

string.name: llm_camera_status_responding
string.description: Status text shown while LlmCamera model is generating a response.

string.name: llm_camera_status_done
string.description: Status text shown when LlmCamera finishes generating a response. [CHAR_LIMIT=15] [BACKUP_MESSAGE_ID: 5969525977325895045]

string.name: llm_camera_status_error
string.description: Status text template shown when an error occurs during LlmCamera operation.

string.name: llm_camera_recognized_prefix
string.description: Prefix for recognized speech text in LlmCamera.

string.name: llm_camera_response_prefix
string.description: Prefix for model response text in LlmCamera.

string.name: llm_camera_status_prefix
string.description: Prefix for current status text in LlmCamera.

string.name: llm_camera_btn_start_listening
string.description: Button text to start speech recognition in LlmCamera.

string.name: llm_camera_btn_stop_listening
string.description: Button text to stop speech recognition in LlmCamera.

string.name: llm_camera_cd_toggle_mic
string.description: Content description for the microphone toggle button in LlmCamera.

resources.string: The model you\'ve selected may exceed your device\'s memory, which can cause the app to crash. For the best experience, we recommend trying a smaller model.
Setting max tokens above 10000 may cause app to be unstable.
Select a use case to try
Tapping \"Reset\" will reset LiteRT-LM engine only. The game progress won\'t be affected.
The game progress won\'t be affected
This process typically takes several minutes and cannot be interrupted once started. Would you like to proceed?
Send anonymous usage data to help improve Trace
Enter system instructions (e.g., \"You are a versatile assistant. Provide accurate, context-aware responses in a professional tone.\")
Tap on graph to see value
Trace runs fully on-device. No data ever leaves your phone.
I\'ve set the screen brightness to %1$d%%.
Control your device with simple commands
I could not quite understand that. Could you try again with more specific details?
Failed to save to photo album
This demo is locked. To unlock the %s agent, you need to compile the model yourself using our open-source recipe.
2. Follow the instructions to fine tune the model and convert it to .litertlm format.
3. Transfer the file to this phone.
4. Tap Load Model below to unlock the demo.
Chat with on-device large language models.
Explore community contributed skills on GitHub discussions
Add a skill from a curated list of community contributed skills
Enter the URL of a skill directory hosted on Web
Create a skill from scratch in-app
Please first \"adb push\" the whole skill directory to /sdcard/Download

Third-party skills are not authored or endorsed by Google. Google is not responsible for their contents, security, or data handling practices.

Please exercise caution before providing sensitive information, such as personal identification, tokens, or API keys.

Any use of an Agent Skill is subject to the applicable terms for that Skill.
Are you sure you want to delete the skill?

plurals.name: delete_selected_skills_content
plurals.item: Are you sure you want to delete %d skill?
Are you sure you want to delete %d skills?

resources.string: The field names need to match the ones in instructions.
Please enable the skill by tapping the Skills button below
Enter URL of skill\'s root directory
A curated list of community contributed skills
View, create, and manage your skills
Enabling more than %s may impact performance.
Prompt copied to clipboard. Paste it into your favorite LLM app to generate the code and copy/paste the code here.
A skill with the same name already exists. Do you want to replace it?
REQUIRED. In the form of my-skill-name
REQUIRED. A brief description of the skill\'s function and trigger conditions or keywords.
Detailed instructions in Markdown format that LLM must follow to accomplish the task.
Are you sure you want to revoke permission to automatically call this tool?
Learn more about MCP in Trace
Are you sure you want to delete this MCP server?

Third-party MCPs are not authored or endorsed by Google. Google is not responsible for their contents, security, or data handling practices.

Please exercise caution before providing sensitive information, such as personal identification, tokens, or API keys.

Any use of an MCP is subject to the applicable terms for that MCP.
This MCP server URL is already added.
Chat history does not persist across demos.
Are you sure you want to clear the history? This action cannot be undone.

string.name: import_model_terms_subtitle
string.description: Subtitle in the import model bottom sheet reminding users to adhere to separate model terms.

resources.string: You are responsible for adhering to any separate terms applicable to models.

string.name: cd_import_model_from_hugging_face
string.description: Content description spoken when the import model from hugging face button is focused.

string.name: import_model_from_hugging_face
string.description: Text label on the button/option to import a model from Hugging Face.

string.name: import_from_hugging_face_title
string.description: Title of the dialog box for importing a model from Hugging Face.

string.name: enter_hugging_face_url
string.description: Prompt text to guide the user to enter a Hugging Face model URL.

resources.string: "Enter the Hugging Face model file URL, for example: "

string.name: hugging_face_url_placeholder
string.description: Placeholder text shown inside the text field where the user enters the URL.

string.name: next
string.description: Button text to navigate to the next step.

string.name: unsupported_model_title
string.description: Title of the dialog showing that the imported model type is unsupported.

string.name: unsupported_file_type_error
string.description: Message informing the user that only .task or .litertlm file formats are supported.

resources.string: Only \".task\" or \".litertlm\" file type is supported.

string.name: unsupported_web_model_error
string.description: Message explaining that the model is only for web browsers and not supported on the Android application.

resources.string: Looks like the model is a web-only model and is not supported by the app.
Current model is %1$s. Tap to change model.
Please check your internet connection and try again later.
This is a gated model. Please click the button below to view and agree to the user agreement. After accepting, simply close that tab to proceed with the model download.

Use specialized, high-order reasoning by loading different skills or creating your own. Explore community contributed skills on GitHub discussions.\n\nTry tapping a sample prompt below to see %3$s in action!
Number of turns before the conversation resets

string.name: new_badge
string.description: Badge label indicating a new feature. [CHAR_LIMIT=5]

string.name: llm_camera_title
string.description: Title of the LlmCamera screen. [CHAR_LIMIT=30]

string.name: llm_camera_cd_flip_camera
string.description: Content description for the flip button in LlmCamera. Camera is a generic term. [CHAR_LIMIT=30]
